items.briefing:
A new study warns that 1 in 10 Australian organisations may be unable to recover control of their systems if AI tools accidentally expose administrator credentials to attackers. Separately, research shows Australian businesses are struggling to keep up with managing who — and what — has access to their AI systems, increasing the risk of unauthorised access or data breaches. Both findings highlight a growing gap between how quickly AI is being adopted and how well it is being secured.

**Practical tip:** Check that any AI tools used in your organisation cannot access or store sensitive login credentials — if they don't need that access, remove it.
